scripts.lint:py: ./.venv/bin/ruff check src tests || ruff check src tests
scripts.format:py: ./.venv/bin/ruff format src tests || ruff format src tests
scripts.lint: npm run lint:py && npm run typecheck:py
scripts.postversion: git push origin main --follow-tags && npm run push:release
scripts.push:release: node -e "const v = require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('gh release create v' + v + ' --generate-notes', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
scripts.deploy: npm run lint && npm run test && npm version patch -m "v%s" --force && npm run cleanup-releases && npm run update
